messages.content:
Extract the core asset information from the text and output a normalized JSON object.
Text: enovate3d EP400-SP, a multifunctional solder paste printing equipment.

Normalize the vendor/manufacturer and product naming into JSON.
Text: Xihu Future Intelligent Manufacturing (West Lake), brand enovate3d, model EP400-SP, multifunctional solder paste printer.

Convert the following capability statements into structured fields with unit normalization.
Statements: Minimum jet-printed solder paste dot diameter reaches 250 μm; minimum dip-transfer dot diameter reaches 100 μm; maximum deep-cavity processing depth reaches 6 mm.

Extract key features and interfaces from the text, and output a normalized JSON.
Text: Adjustable conveyor rail width supports up to 350 mm carriers; supports Gerber/DXF import or parameterized programming; supports SMEMA line interface; up to 3G motion acceleration.

Extract the motion system specifications and normalize units.
Specs: Travel range 450 mm (X) × 650 mm (Y) × 20 mm (Z1) / 50 mm (Z2); max speed X/Y 1000 mm/s, Z 300 mm/s; positioning accuracy X/Y ±10 μm, Z1/Z2 ±5 μm.

Extract only the jet printing module information and output JSON.
Text: The jet printing solder paste module uses a piezoelectric needle-impact jet valve; nozzle inner diameter supports 0.07 mm to 0.40 mm.

Extract only the dip-transfer module information and output JSON.
Text: The dip-transfer module is a contact dip-and-transfer needle; needle diameter supports 0.05 mm to 0.25 mm.

Convert the fixture/carrier system information into normalized JSON.
Text: Carrier size ranges from 90 mm × 90 mm to 210 mm × 350 mm; continuous adjustment; payload 3 kg.

Extract the vision subsystem specs as structured JSON.
Text: 5-megapixel vision camera; field of view 5.9 × 4.4 mm; supports fiducial capture and positioning.

Extract the height-following sensor information.
Text: A coaxial laser displacement sensor is used for print-needle height following; measurement accuracy ≤ 25 μm.

Normalize the cleaning features into JSON.
Text: Supports vacuum cleaning and dry-wipe cleaning.

Extract metering/weighing resolution and cleanroom-related info.
Text: Resolution accuracy 0.1 mg; equipped with a dry-grade FFU cleanroom system.

Convert the throughput statement into a structured field.
Text: Operating efficiency is about 5 pads per second (example: solder paste jetting for 0402 pads).

Extract processing capability with the referenced solder paste type.
Text: Minimum jet-print dot diameter 250 μm (Type7); minimum dip-transfer dot diameter 100 μm (Type7).

Extract only physical installation information into JSON.
Text: Machine dimensions W1480 × D1480 × H2000 mm; machine weight about 1500 kg.

Extract electrical requirements and normalize units.
Text: 380 VAC / 50 Hz / 5 kW.

Extract environmental and air supply requirements.
Text: Working temperature 22 ± 2 °C; working humidity < 80% RH; air supply pressure 0.6–0.8 MPa.

Extract application scenarios into a structured JSON list.
Text: Suitable for PCB boards of different shapes and sizes, irregular components, and complex pad layouts.

Extract the process recommendations into JSON.
Text: Solder paste options include SAC305 and SnPb; printing modes include jet forming and dip transfer.

Normalize software/automation and programming options.
Text: Supports software-driven automated operation via CAD data or parameterized programming; supports importing Gerber/DXF graphics.
